title: Exercise 3. Quarto features
text:
Note









Note



This is a callout. You can use it to draw attention to important information.








Tip



This is a tip.








Warning



This is a warning.








Important



This is important information.








Caution



This is a caution.








TipHelpful tip



Remember to save your file before you render.








This is a simple callout. :::::: {.callout-note appearance=“minimal”} This is a minimal callout.
